name: claude
description: Delegate investigation, review, and adversarial review to Claude Code from within Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to Claude Code from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Invoke Claude Code headlessly from Codex for investigation, rescue, review, and adversarial-review workflows. Uses OAuth subscription (no API keys). Mirrors openai/codex-plugin-cc's command surface, inverted: Codex delegates to Claude instead of the reverse.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review the current diff
Have Claude Code investigate a failing test
Get an adversarial review from Claude Code
